Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are microphones, headphones,[n]and some unfamiliar devices...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if the songs that are played[n]during lunch breaks are the broadcast[n]committee's personal favorites...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems announcements and student[n]summons are broadcasted from here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear bizarre music playing inside...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Why does the school have music like this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Must be a teacher's theme song or something that plays when they enter a classroom![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I try entering the PA room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, you have to have permission to be in—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Huh? This song? I have no idea what it's for, but it says "Gekkoukan Boogie" on it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sure, you can have it. We don't have any use for it, anyway... Here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now get out of here before you get me in trouble.[n]{f 1 1}
